theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

narrative.summary: Akash: 정량 종합 54점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 57 / 중기 64 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 극과열
overheat.guidance: 회피하거나 차익실현. 지금 진입은 단기 손실 위험 매우 큼.

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 1개 시그널 합류 — 주봉 50MA. 현재가 대비 +9.1% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $0.7411 아래 손절가 $0.6843 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

timeframes.note: 가격이 50/200MA 위 + 골든 크로스 · RSI 과매수

multi_tf.note: TF가 align 안 됨 — conviction 낮음, 보수적 사이징.

top_news.title: Apollo’s West Technology Is in Talks to Sell Remaining Business
top_news.summary: Apollo Global Management Inc.-backed West Technology is engaged in exclusive talks to sell its remaining operating business to a counter-party, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: Asian Stocks to Rise as AI Rally Spurs Wall Street: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Asian stocks were set to rise Friday after Wall Street hit fresh records, buoyed by a rally in artificial intelligence shares, strong corporate earnings and further signs of resilience in the US consumer.

top_news.title: Foreign Investors Fear Retreat in Japan’s Governance Reforms
top_news.summary: Investor concern is mounting over a possible rollback of Japan’s corporate governance reforms, a key driver of foreign investment, threatening a rally that pushed equities to record levels.

top_news.title: S&P 500 Tops 7,500 as AI Fuels Record-Breaking Run: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: A revival of the artificial-intelligence trade kept fueling momentum in stocks, with the market also rising after retail sales showed signs of consumer strength despite a war-driven surge in energy costs.

top_news.title: Pound Tumbles as Burnham Escalates Labour Revolt Against Starmer
top_news.summary: A potential challenge to UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s leadership from one of the nation’s most popular Labour Party politicians sent the pound tumbling by casting doubt on the future of his government and its efforts to rein in the national debt.

top_news.title: Private Aviation 'Immunized' from Fuel Cost Spikes, Says Wheels Up's George Mattson
top_news.summary:
George Mattson, CEO of private aviation company Wheels Up, said that his company is 'immunized' from the impact of fuel cost spikes because they are able to pass off surcharges to customers willing to pay a premium. 
Mattson discussed Delta's investment in the private sphere and said the airline company sees Wheels Up as an extension of its growing premium commercial strategy.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Winklevosses Invest $100 Million in Battered Gemini Exchange
top_news.summary: Tyler and Cameron Winklevoss, the billionaire twins who founded Gemini Space Station Inc., made a $100 million “strategic investment” into the money-losing crypto exchange.

top_news.title: World Bank Team to Visit Venezuela to Meet Government Officials
top_news.summary: A group of representatives from the World Bank will visit Caracas to engage with government authorities for the first time since reestablishing formal relations last month, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: Why Rare Earths Are China’s Trump Card in Trade War
top_news.summary: Rare earths are among the most critical raw materials on the planet, deeply embedded in the technologies that underpin modern life — from iPhones and cars to data centers and MRI machines.

top_news.title: Emerging Currencies Dip as US Retail Data Boosts Dollar
top_news.summary: Most emerging-market currencies fell Thursday on the back of a stronger dollar after US retail sales signaled consumer resilience in the world’s largest economy despite sharply higher gasoline prices.
